transcript.text: Hi, I'm Eva from AtLegionX. How are you feeling today?
Yeah, hi. I've been feeling pretty sad and upset lately. I don't know why.
I'm really sorry you've been feeling that way.How long have these sad or upset feelings been going on?
Uh, probably the past, uh, four days.
That sounds like it's been weighing on you for a few days now.Have you noticed any changes in your sleep, appetite, energy, or ability to concentrate lately?
Yeah, I, I can't concentrate, work shit for some reason. I don't know why.
I'm sorry that's making things even harder for you right now.Have you been feeling this way for more than two weeks, or has anything stressful happened recently that might explain it?

I'm so sorry to hear about your dog—that's a really painful loss.Besides the sadness and trouble concentrating, have you noticed any other changes like feeling tired, losing interest in things you usually enjoy, or thoughts that life isn't worth living?
